rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding assessment of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated prior-work anchors are broad historical reviews (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), not this specific 2018 neural-branding study. The match evidence is only a single DOI reference with no citation-context text, which is consistent with an incidental/example listing of one article in the reviewed period rather than substantive methodological or theoretical dependence.
